film.title: The 6th Man
film.overview: A college athlete returns from the dead to help his brother's basketball team win the NCAA title.

dialogues.dialogue: - Kenny! Antoine! - Mom!  You got it. You know you got it.  Oh, gosh. Your father would have been so proud of you both today.  - I wish he could've seen you play. - So do we.  But his spirit lives on in you.

Yeah, why not?  Yeah. Hell, yeah.  You must be proud. The team's been kicking a*s.  Oh, yeah. We've been really hot lately, you know.  No, you've been more than hot. It's been weird. You know what I'm saying?

Honey, I don't know what's gonna happen in New York and I don't care.  I just wanna say thank you, baby.  I just wish your daddy was here. Ooh. He would be so proud of you.  - Who's your baby girl? - You, Ma.  You better believe it.
